title: Banks Charge $900 for a Trick You Can Do Free
hook: Your bank charges nine hundred dollars to enroll you in their 'biweekly mortgage program' — and that exact same trick costs you absolutely nothing to pull off yourself.
angle: Banks monetize financial ignorance by selling homeowners a DIY trick that requires zero cost or permission — then pocketing $900 for the privilege
audience: Homeowners with a 30-year mortgage who want to pay it off faster and save tens of thousands in interest
